name: GASTRIC POLYP

demographics.Associated with: hyperacidity + ulcers, chronic atrophic gastritis, gastric carcinoma
demographics.Location: predominantly in fundus + body; usually multiple
demographics.Histo: densely packed gastric glands + bundles of smooth muscle

dominant_finding: sharply delineated polyp with smooth circular border
distribution: predominantly in fundus + body; usually multiple
discriminating_features: sharply delineated polyp with smooth circular border
"Mexican hat" sign = stalk seen en face overlying the head of polyp
usually < 2 cm in diameter without progression

general: sharply delineated polyp with smooth circular border
"Mexican hat" sign = stalk seen en face overlying the head of polyp
usually < 2 cm in diameter without progression
broad-based elliptical / mushroom-shaped polyp ± pedicle; usually solitary
